title: phlomoides fulgens
intro: Phlomoides fulgens, also known as the red-tipped lucerne or red-flowered lucerne, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The plant is also believed to have health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure and reducing anxiety, likely due to its flavonoid and phenolic content. Phlomoides fulgens can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
